All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

S

setBinaryOperator(BinOpButton) - Method in class situations.Situation
Sets the binary operator to the specified button
setBorder(Color) - Method in class buttons.CalculatorButton
Sets the border color of the button
setColor(Color) - Method in class buttons.CalculatorButton
Sets the background color of the button
setLeftOperand(int) - Method in class situations.Situation
Sets the left operand to the specified value
Situation - Class in situations
Represents the current situation of the calculator, including the state, display, binary operator, and left operand
Situation(JLabel) - Constructor for class situations.Situation
Constructs a Situation object with the specified display
situations - package situations
Contain the situational and state class
State - Enum Class in situations
Represents the different states of the calculator.
